rationale: The citing paper explicitly states it extends prior sales contest work that focused on prize structure (e.g., winner-take-all vs multiple winners), and the cited 2009 paper is precisely an empirical sales-contest prize-structure study (single vs multiple winners; ranked vs equal prizes). Given this direct conceptual overlap in core constructs and research gap framing, the citation is plausibly foundational/comparison-oriented rather than incidental. The reference is also matched by DOI.
